name: New England Clam Quiche
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit. Bake pie shell for 8 minutes. Reduce heat to 325 degrees Fahrenheit. Combine bacon, chowder, eggs, onion, sour cream, parsley and pepper. Mix well. Pour about 2/3 of the mixture into the shell. Arrange cheese slices on top. Add the rest of the chowder mix. Bake for 50-55 minutes or until set. Let stand for 20 minutes before serving.
